productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Slip On Black Formal Shoes
description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of franco leone loafers. Give your formalwear a twist of style with this leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion.UpperLeather upper with a textured vamp and smooth upper for absolute comfort and styleSlip-on style for ease of useConcealed elasticated gussets on the midfoot below the tongue to offer a snug, customised FitLeather inner lining for all-day sweat-free comfortLeather footbed for absolute all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole for durabilityHeavy texturing below the forefoot and the heelShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
